CONTACT: Brian C. Wendorff, Contract Specialist, Phone 3202456205, Email bwendorff@bop.gov
DESC: The Federal Correctional Institution, Sandstone, Minnesota intends to issue solicitation 15B41320Q00000004 for the 2nd Quarter, FY 2020 milk requirement. This solicitation is 100% set-aside for small business under NAICS 311511. The Government contemplates award of a firm-fixed price type contract from this solicitation. The Government reserves the right upon award to make formal single or multiple awards. The Government will award to the responsible offeror(s), whose offer conforming to the solicitation, is considered to be most advantageous to the Government based on best value. Pricing will be FOB destination. The solicitation will be available on or about November 5, 2019 and will be distributed solely through the General Services Administration's Federal Business Opportunities web site at http://www.fbo.gov. The site provides downloading instructions. Hard copies of the solicitation will not be distributed. All future information regarding this acquisition, including amendments, will be distributed through this site. Interested parties are responsible for monitoring this site to ensure they have the most up-to-date information about this solicitation. The Government may make awards without discussions; therefore, offerors are instructed to submit their best offer initially. Faith-Based and Community-Based Organizations have the right to submit quotes equally with other organizations for contracts for which they are eligible. All contractors doing business with the Federal Government must be registered in the System for Award Management (SAM) database at www.sam.gov. Payments will be made using Electronic Funds Transfer (EFT). Each offeror, in accordance with FAR 52.212-3, is required to complete the annual representations and certification electronically via the System for Award Management (SAM) website located at https://www.sam.gov/portal.
DIV: Important Dates & Times (All times are Arizona Local Time)
P: The requirement is for providing Health Insurance Services per the Global Medical Coverage specifications to locally Employed Staff (LE Staff) of the U. S. Mission in Iraq. The estimated number of LE Staff employees is 482 and the estimated number of independents is 739, for a total estimated number of 1221 enrollees. Please note these are only estimated numbers.
SUBJECT: FCI Sandstone FY20 2nd Qtr Dairy Requirement
